response: Hershel Greene and Carl Grimes appear in the comic book series "The Walking Dead," which is a post-apocalyptic horror television series. They are portrayed by Scott Wilson and Chandler Riggs, respectively, in the American television series of the same name, which airs on AMC in the United States. The character of Hershel Greene is introduced as the widowed owner of a farm in Georgia, and he is initially introduced saving the life of Carl Grimes after he is shot by one of Hershel's neighbors, Otis. Carl Grimes is the son of Rick Grimes and his wife Lori Grimes, and he is one of the longest-surviving characters in the series.
